question.text: SEBI's circular mandating margin obligations to be given by way of Pledge/Re-pledge in the Depository System came into effect from which date?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** The provisions of the SEBI circular dated February 25, 2020 regarding margin obligations by way of Pledge/Re-pledge came into effect from August 1, 2020. **The Trap:** February 25, 2020 is when the circular was issued, not when it came into effect. **Cross-Exam Context:** NISM Series VIII (Equity Derivatives) also covers margin pledge requirements. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Since August 1, 2020, title transfer of securities for margin purposes is prohibited — only margin pledge is permitted.
